text: And Hamza*** was attacking upon the people when the defeated ones saw him=*, and no one could stand up to him™*%, and Hind Bint Utba, may the Curse be upon her, had given a pact to a savage (her slave), ‘If you were to kill Muhammad*, or Ali**:, or Hamza™*, | shall grant you your pleasure’, and the savage was an Ethiopian slave of Al-Jubeyr Bin Mut'am. The savage said, ‘As for Muhammad****, | am not able upon him™***, and as for Ali*"", | see him®** as a cautious man of a lot of looking around, so | cannot covet regarding him=*. | ‘shall ambush Hamza*, as | see him*** guiding the people with guidance.
